blurb_en:
Anthropic opened its books on June 1, filing a confidential S-1 with the SEC to begin the process of going public near a $1 trillion valuation — the largest venture-backed IPO in history if it proceeds.
• The filing follows a $65 billion Series H that pushed Anthropic's valuation to $965 billion and a revenue run-rate of $47 billion in May — up nearly fivefold in under a year, with coding tools as the primary driver.
• Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are underwriting the offering. No share count or price range has been set; timing depends on market conditions.
• OpenAI also filed confidentially in May, targeting Q4 2026. Two labs that spent years insisting profit wasn't the point are now racing to be first to the exchange.
• Anthropic's $47 billion run-rate puts it ahead of Goldman Sachs and American Airlines by revenue, and ahead of most companies that have ever gone public.
• The AI safety company that invented Constitutional AI is now preparing a prospectus for institutional investors. Both documents tell you something about the audience they're written for.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic于6月1日向美国证券交易委员会秘密提交了S-1文件，正式启动近千亿美元估值的上市进程——若成功，将成为有史以来规模最大的风险投资支持型科技公司IPO。
• 本次申请以Anthropic完成650亿美元H轮融资为基础，估值达965亿美元；5月年化营收约470亿美元，同比增长近五倍，主要驱动力为编程工具。
• 高盛和摩根士丹利担任承销商。目前未设定股价区间或上市日期，具体进程视市场情况而定。
• OpenAI也已于5月秘密提交S-1，目标是Q4 2026上市。两家成天说安全比利润更重要的AI公司，正在竞相赶赴交易所。
• Anthropic 470亿美元的年化营收已超过高盛和美国航空，跻身极少数能以如此体量上市的公司之列。
• 发明了宪法AI概念的AI安全公司，正在为机构投资者准备招股说明书。两份文件都能告诉你它们各自写给的是什么受众。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (June 1), CNBC (June 1), CNN Business (June 1), Fortune (June 1). $65B raise and $965B valuation confirmed across all outlets. $47B revenue run-rate from Fortune. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley underwriting confirmed by CNBC.

blurb_en:
Storyboarding is all about framing the shot — and for his next film, Martin Scorsese is letting Flux do the framing.
• Scorsese confirmed he has joined AI image startup Black Forest Labs as a partner and adviser, using its Flux model to storyboard his upcoming film "What Happens at Night," starring Leonardo DiCaprio and Jennifer Lawrence.
• Black Forest Labs is a 70-person outfit based in Freiburg, Germany, whose Flux model powers image features inside Adobe, Canva, Microsoft, and Meta — one of the most widely deployed image models in the world.
• Scorsese's stated position: the tools are "creatively freeing," and he called for full industry transparency about AI use — a standard most of his peers quietly avoid.
• Director Boots Riley's response: "F*ck him." That is the complete quote.
• Black Forest Labs is the same company behind the Flux models that power the open-source image generation community — Scorsese's endorsement lands where it can do the most industry work.
• For the camera and imaging industry: the director most associated with the craft of visual storytelling just publicly backed AI image generation, with his name on the company.
blurb_zh:
导演马丁·斯科塞斯宣布成为AI图像生成公司Black Forest Labs的合伙人与顾问，并在下一部电影分镜创作中使用了Flux工具。
• 这部电影名为《深夜之事》，由莱昂纳多·迪卡普里奥和詹妮弗·劳伦斯主演。
• Black Forest Labs是一家总部位于德国弗莱堡的70人公司，其Flux图像模型为Adobe、Canva、微软和Meta的图像功能提供底层支持，是全球部署最广泛的图像生成模型之一。
• 斯科塞斯表示，这项工具让他能够更直接地传达视觉构想，称其「有一种创作上的自由感」，并呼吁整个行业对AI使用保持透明——这个标准他大多数同行都在回避。
• 导演布茨·莱利的回应：「操他。」这是完整引文。
• 对Insta360的提示：与视觉叙事工艺联系最紧密的导演，刚刚公开为AI图像生成背书，并把自己的名字放到了公司里。这场对话已经上升到了另一个层级。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (June 2), TechCrunch (June 2), Hollywood Reporter (June 2), IndieWire (June 2), Rolling Stone (June 3). Flux model, film title, DiCaprio/Lawrence casting, Freiburg HQ, Boots Riley quote confirmed across multiple outlets.

blurb_en:
Suno officially closed its $400 million Series D on June 3 at a $5.4 billion valuation — the funding round this newsletter has been tracking for three months.
• Bond Capital led the round; IVP, Forerunner, Union Square Ventures, Alkeon Capital, and Quiet also participated, alongside unnamed artists, producers, and songwriters the company says are among the best in the music industry.
• The valuation has more than doubled since Suno's $2.45 billion round in November 2025; the platform now has 2 million paying subscribers and sits third on Apple's App Store music section.
• Warner Music settled its lawsuit with Suno last November and became a licensing partner; the new model developed under that deal will roll out "in the coming months."
• Sony Music and Universal Music lawsuits remain active. Suno has managed to license with one major label while being sued by the other two.
• The company that faces copyright litigation over its training data just raised $5.4 billion. In venture capital, that math has been adding up all year.
blurb_zh:
AI音乐生成公司Suno于6月3日正式宣布完成4亿美元D轮融资，估值54亿美元，由Bond Capital领投。
• IVP、Forerunner、Union Square Ventures、Alkeon Capital和Quiet参与投资，另有若干未披露身份的艺人、制作人和词曲作者加入本轮。
• 本轮估值是2025年11月2.45亿美元估值的两倍以上；平台目前拥有200万付费用户，位居苹果App Store音乐类目第三。
• 华纳音乐去年11月已与Suno达成和解并建立授权合作关系，双方联合研发的新模型将「在未来几个月内」推出。
• 索尼音乐和环球音乐的诉讼仍在进行中。Suno同时与一家大厂签约授权，被另外两家大厂起诉——这种平衡术在音乐行业很难长期维持。
• 那家因训练数据面临版权诉讼的公司，刚刚完成了54亿美元估值的融资。这笔账在风险投资里全年都算得过去。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (June 3), Hollywood Reporter (June 3), Bloomberg (June 3), Digital Music News (June 3), Boston Globe (June 3). Bond Capital as lead, investor list, $5.4B valuation, 2M subscribers, #3 App Store position all confirmed across multiple outlets. Warner Music partnership confirmed via earlier Digital Music News reporting (Nov 2025).

blurb_en:
CNN filed a copyright and trademark lawsuit against Perplexity AI on May 28, accusing the AI search company of scraping and redistributing more than 17,000 CNN stories, photos, and videos without permission.
• This is the first AI copyright action filed by a television network, and Perplexity's ninth active lawsuit from news organizations.
• Co-plaintiffs from earlier suits include the New York Times, News Corp, the New York Post, the Chicago Tribune, Encyclopedia Britannica, Merriam-Webster, Reddit, and Japan's Yomiuri Shimbun.
• CNN tried to negotiate a licensing deal, failed, blocked Perplexity's scraper bot — and then got scraped anyway.
• Perplexity's public response: "You can't copyright facts." Four words. That's the company's entire legal thesis.
• If that thesis holds in court, every news organization's training data claim fails. If it doesn't, the AI search industry's current business model needs rebuilding at the foundation.
blurb_zh:
CNN于5月28日在纽约南区联邦地方法院起诉Perplexity AI，指控这家AI搜索公司非法抓取并使用了1.7万余条CNN新闻报道、照片和视频内容。
• 这是首起由电视网络提起的AI版权诉讼；对Perplexity而言，这是来自媒体机构的第九起诉讼。
• 此前已提起诉讼的原告包括：《纽约时报》、新闻集团、《纽约邮报》、《芝加哥论坛报》、大英百科全书、韦伯斯特词典、Reddit和日本《读卖新闻》。
• CNN曾尝试与Perplexity协商授权，谈判破裂后屏蔽了爬虫——但内容仍遭抓取。
• Perplexity首席传播官的回应：「事实不受版权保护。」四个字，这是公司的全部法律立场。
• 如果这一立场在法庭上成立，所有新闻机构对训练数据的版权主张都将失效；如果不成立，整个AI搜索行业的商业模式需要从根基重建。
verification_notes: Primary source is CNN's own reporting on its own lawsuit (May 28). Confirmed via Variety (May 28), Deadline (May 28), NPR (May 28), Al Jazeera (May 28), MediaNama. Perplexity response quote from CNN. Nine-organization plaintiff count confirmed via TechTimes (May 31).

blurb_en:
Google Labs launched Dreambeans on June 3, an AI app for iOS and Android that reads your Gmail, Google Calendar, Photos, and YouTube history and converts it into a small daily collection of illustrated cartoon stories.
• The app is powered by Nano Banana 2, Google's image model, and is built as a "doomscrolling antidote" — capped at 10 to 14 stories per day.
• The name is Dreambeans. TechCrunch called it "its weirdest-named AI tool to date." Google did not deny this.
• Currently available only to U.S.-based Google AI Ultra subscribers on iOS and Android, with a waitlist open to all personal Google account holders.
• The product concept: use the complete surveillance archive Google already holds on you to make personalized content you'll actually want to look at. Whether this is charming or alarming depends on how you feel about the archive.
• Nano Banana 2 generates the illustrations from details in your personal data. The result is a cartoon strip. The input is your life.
blurb_zh:
谷歌旗下Labs部门于6月3日推出Dreambeans，一款iOS和Android应用，读取你的Gmail、日历、谷歌相册和YouTube历史，将其转化为每日一小包个性化漫画故事。
• 应用由谷歌图像模型Nano Banana 2驱动，定位为刷屏解毒剂——每天上限10至14个故事。
• 这款应用的名字叫Dreambeans。TechCrunch称其为「迄今为止名字最奇怪的AI工具」。谷歌没有否认。
• 目前仅面向美国地区Google AI Ultra订阅用户，普通Google账户可加入候补名单。
• 产品逻辑：用谷歌早已掌握的你的全套数据，做成你会想主动看的个性化内容。这是温馨还是可怕，取决于你对那套数据的态度。
• Nano Banana 2根据你的个人数据生成插图。输出是漫画。输入是你的人生。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (June 3), 9to5Google (June 3), SiliconAngle (June 3), Droid Life (June 3), Google official Labs blog. Nano Banana 2 as image model, 10-14 story cap, US-only Ultra subscriber requirement all confirmed across sources.

blurb_en:
China's State Administration for Market Regulation put new trade secret rules into effect on June 1 that, for the first time, explicitly classify AI algorithms, model training data, and machine learning parameters as protected trade secrets.
• The regulations are the first overhaul of China's trade secret law since 1998 — nearly three decades — and are designed to prevent AI knowledge from leaking to foreign competitors.
• Any information related to AI structure, algorithms, data, computer programs, or model parameters now falls under the law. Violations carry fines of up to 5 million yuan (roughly €630,000).
• Cross-border data work now requires access controls, data anonymization, and detailed logs of who accessed, copied, or modified what — including remote workers.
• The timing is not subtle: the US is blocking GPU exports to China; China is building a legal wall around the algorithms those chips would train. Both governments are trying to lock in advantages before the other catches up.
• For Insta360 and any company with research teams on both sides of the Pacific: AI model weights, training pipelines, and performance data are now formally in scope of China's trade secret enforcement regime.
blurb_zh:
中国国家市场监督管理总局于6月1日正式施行《商业秘密保护条例》，首次明确将AI算法、训练数据和模型参数纳入法定商业秘密保护范围，违规者可被罚款最高500万元人民币。
• 这是1998年以来中国首次更新商业秘密保护法规，旨在防止AI核心技术向境外竞争对手泄露。
• 凡涉及AI结构、算法、数据、计算机程序或模型参数的信息，均纳入保护范围；国家市场监管总局负责执法。
• 涉及跨境协作的AI数据工作，现须实施访问控制、数据脱敏，并保留详细访问日志，覆盖远程办公场景。
• 时机并非巧合：美国正通过出口管制封锁GPU，中国正通过立法为算法建起法律屏障。两个政府都在抢在对方追上来之前锁定优势。
• 对Insta360及所有在两岸设有研发团队的公司：AI模型权重、训练流程和性能数据，从6月1日起正式进入中国商业秘密执法范围，现有数据共享协议可能需要重新审查。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Bloomberg (June 2), Euronews (June 2), Business Upturn, AIC (AI Commission), Sheppard law firm analysis, ecns.cn (official Chinese state media wire). June 1 effective date confirmed across all sources. Fine amount (5M yuan), 1998 last update, and SAMR enforcement all confirmed.
